requirement_topic.en: NIGELEC Grid Connection — 220/380 V, 50 Hz and Project Acceptance
requirement_topic.zh: NIGELEC并网接入——220/380 V、50 Hz及项目验收
requirement_topic.zht: NIGELEC併網接入——220/380 V、50 Hz及項目驗收

summary.en: NIGELEC is the principal electricity distributor in Niger and operates production, transmission, and distribution activities under Niger's electricity framework. Grid-connected EV charger projects should be treated as electrical installations requiring NIGELEC technical coordination for supply capacity, metering, protection settings, earthing, harmonics, load management, commissioning, and service responsibility. ARSE is the energy-sector regulator identified in Niger's electricity code framework, and regulated electricity activities may require ARSE treatment. Niger is a 50 Hz market with low-voltage supply commonly stated as 220/380 V, which is nominally close to China's 220/380 V 50 Hz baseline; however, Niger's low electrification rate and distribution constraints make high-power public four-wheel charging highly site-specific.
summary.zh: NIGELEC是尼日尔主要电力分销商，并在尼日尔电力法规框架下从事发电、输电和配电活动。并网电动汽车充电桩项目应按电气装置处理，须与NIGELEC进行供电容量、计量、保护整定、接地、谐波、负载管理、调试和服务责任的技术协调。ARSE是尼日尔电力法框架确认的能源行业监管机构，受监管的电力活动可能需要ARSE处理。尼日尔为50 Hz市场，低压供电通常表述为220/380 V，与中国220/380 V、50 Hz基线在标称值上接近；但尼日尔电气化率低、配电容量受限，使高功率四轮车公共充电高度依赖具体站点。
summary.zht: NIGELEC是尼日主要電力分銷商，並在尼日電力法規框架下從事發電、輸電和配電活動。併網電動汽車充電樁項目應按電氣裝置處理，須與NIGELEC進行供電容量、計量、保護整定、接地、諧波、負載管理、調試和服務責任的技術協調。ARSE是尼日電力法框架確認的能源行業監管機構，受監管的電力活動可能需要ARSE處理。尼日為50 Hz市場，低壓供電通常表述為220/380 V，與中國220/380 V、50 Hz基線在標稱值上接近；但尼日電氣化率低、配電容量受限，使高功率四輪車公共充電高度依賴具體站點。

standards_or_laws: Niger Law No. 2016-005 of 17 May 2016 — Electricity Code
ARSE energy-sector regulatory role under Niger electricity framework
NIGELEC technical connection review for grid-connected electrical installations
IEC 61000 series — electromagnetic compatibility and power quality
Niger low-voltage grid context commonly stated as 220/380 V, 50 Hz

summary.en: China domestic charger installations are accepted under GB/T 18487.1-2023 design evidence, GB/T 20234 connectors, GB/T 27930-2023 communication for DC systems, and local grid-operator project acceptance. China domestic supply is 220 V single-phase / 380 V three-phase, 50 Hz. Although Niger uses the same nominal voltage and frequency, Chinese grid acceptance does not prove NIGELEC site capacity, protection, metering, grounding, harmonic, or commissioning acceptance.
summary.zh: 中国国内充电桩安装依据GB/T 18487.1-2023设计证据、GB/T 20234接口、直流系统GB/T 27930-2023通信，以及当地电网运营商项目验收。中国国内供电为220 V单相 / 380 V三相、50 Hz。虽然尼日尔采用相同标称电压和频率，中国电网验收并不能证明其满足NIGELEC站点容量、保护、计量、接地、谐波或调试验收要求。
summary.zht: 中國國內充電樁安裝依據GB/T 18487.1-2023設計證據、GB/T 20234接口、直流系統GB/T 27930-2023通訊，以及當地電網運營商項目驗收。中國國內供電為220 V單相 / 380 V三相、50 Hz。雖然尼日採用相同標稱電壓和頻率，中國電網驗收並不能證明其滿足NIGELEC站點容量、保護、計量、接地、諧波或調試驗收要求。

standards_or_laws: China local grid operator project-acceptance requirements

gap.en: Exporters must confirm: (1) the charger input ratings cover 220/380 V, 50 Hz and the actual NIGELEC service available at the site; (2) the distribution transformer and feeder can support the proposed AC or DC load; (3) protection settings, RCD strategy, earthing, surge protection, harmonic data, metering, and commissioning records are accepted by NIGELEC; (4) ARSE treatment is resolved where the project involves regulated electricity service; (5) high-temperature and dust derating is documented for Sahel operation. Matching nominal voltage does not make a China domestic charger grid-ready for Niger.
gap.zh: 出口商须确认：(1) 充电桩输入额定值覆盖220/380 V、50 Hz及现场实际NIGELEC供电；(2) 配电变压器和馈线可承载拟建交流或直流负荷；(3) 保护整定、RCD策略、接地、浪涌保护、谐波数据、计量和调试记录获得NIGELEC接受；(4) 项目涉及受监管售电服务时完成ARSE处理；(5) 针对萨赫勒运行环境提供高温和沙尘降额文件。标称电压相同并不意味着中国国内充电桩已满足尼日尔并网准备。
gap.zht: 出口商須確認：(1) 充電樁輸入額定值覆蓋220/380 V、50 Hz及現場實際NIGELEC供電；(2) 配電變壓器和饋線可承載擬建交流或直流負荷；(3) 保護整定、RCD策略、接地、浪湧保護、諧波數據、計量和調試記錄獲得NIGELEC接受；(4) 項目涉及受監管售電服務時完成ARSE處理；(5) 針對薩赫勒運行環境提供高溫和沙塵降額文件。標稱電壓相同並不意味著中國國內充電樁已滿足尼日併網準備。

mandatory_status.target: Project gate — NIGELEC technical connection acceptance and any applicable ARSE treatment should be resolved before commissioning; public high-power charging is constrained by local grid capacity
mandatory_status.cn: China local grid operator acceptance applies domestically and is not a NIGELEC approval substitute even where voltage and frequency are nominally similar

source.publisher: ARSE — Autorité de Régulation du Secteur de l'Energie (Niger)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] A Niger-ready charger package needs NIGELEC site-capacity and commissioning acceptance, ARSE treatment where applicable, IEC-family power-quality evidence, and heat/dust derating. China 220/380 V, 50 Hz grid evidence is useful but not a Niger grid-connection approval.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 面向尼日尔的充电桩资料包须包括NIGELEC站点容量和调试验收、适用时的ARSE处理、IEC体系电能质量证据，以及高温/沙尘降额。中国220/380 V、50 Hz并网证据有参考价值，但不是尼日尔并网批准。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 面向尼日的充電樁資料包須包括NIGELEC站點容量和調試驗收、適用時的ARSE處理、IEC體系電能質量證據，以及高溫/沙塵降額。中國220/380 V、50 Hz併網證據有參考價值，但不是尼日併網批准。
